items.title: Baidu reports Q1 revenue down 1.1% YoY to ~$4.7B, above ~$4.5B est., and net profit down 55% YoY to ~$506.6M, above ~$462.5M est., amid a slow AI payoff (Tracy Qu/Wall Street Journal)

items.title_en: Baidu reports Q1 revenue down 1.1% YoY to ~$4.7B, above ~$4.5B est., and net profit down 55% YoY to ~$506.6M, above ~$462.5M est., amid a slow AI payoff (Tracy Qu/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 百度报告称，由于人工智能回报缓慢，第一季度收入同比下降 1.1% 至约 $4.7B，高于约 $4.5B 预期，净利润同比下降 55% 至约 $5.066 亿，高于约 $4.625M 预期（Tracy Qu/华尔街日报）

items.title: Chinese chipmaker CXMT reports Q1 revenue up 719% YoY to ~$7.5B, net profit up 1,688% to $3.6B, and says Omdia ranks it No. 4 in DRAM with a 7.67% global share (Cheng Ting-Fang/Nikkei Asia)
items.title_original: Chinese chipmaker CXMT reports Q1 revenue up 719% YoY to ~$7.5B, net profit up 1,688% to $3.6B, and says Omdia ranks it No. 4 in DRAM with a 7.67% global share (Cheng Ting-Fang/Nikkei Asia)
items.title_en: Chinese chipmaker CXMT reports Q1 revenue up 719% YoY to ~$7.5B, net profit up 1,688% to $3.6B, and says Omdia ranks it No. 4 in DRAM with a 7.67% global share (Cheng Ting-Fang/Nikkei Asia)
items.title_zh: 中国芯片制造商长鑫存储报告第一季度收入同比增长 719% 至 $7.5B，净利润增长 1,688% 至 $3.6B，并表示 Omdia 在 DRAM 领域排名第四，占据 7.67% 的全球份额（Cheng Ting-Fang/Nikkei Asia）
items.title_bilingual: 中国芯片制造商长鑫存储报告第一季度收入同比增长 719% 至 $7.5B，净利润增长 1,688% 至 $3.6B，并表示 Omdia 在 DRAM 领域排名第四，占据 7.67% 的全球份额（Cheng Ting-Fang/Nikkei Asia） / Chinese chipmaker CXMT reports Q1 revenue up 719% YoY to ~$7.5B, net profit up 1,688% to $3.6B, and says Omdia ranks it No. 4 in DRAM with a 7.67% global share (Cheng Ting-Fang/Nikkei Asia)
